conclusion.label: US East Metal
conclusion.legacyOrDeprecated: not indicated by current official documentation
conclusion.normalizationRequirement: no such requirement is documented and no control-plane normalization state was observed

officialSources.title: Regions
officialSources.claim: US East Metal in Virginia uses region identifier us-east4-eqdc4a; the identifier is valid in Config as Code.

officialSources.title: Edge Networking
officialSources.claim: The us-east4-eqdc4a upstream/edge zone maps to US East, Virginia.

officialSources.title: Config as Code Reference
officialSources.claim: us-east4-eqdc4a is accepted as a current multiRegionConfig key.

unsupportedClaimsAvoided: selecting the already selected region is a no-op
a hidden migration state cannot exist
same-looking display names prove resource identity
decision: The existing placement already satisfies the intended US East region requirement. A region action is unnecessary to reach the documented target; this does not claim that Railway has affirmatively documented the absence of every hidden normalization mechanism.
